leadText: Aura Break (Japanese: オーラブレイク Aura Break) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. It is one of the signature Abilities of Zygarde.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Aura Break inverts the effects of Fairy Aura and Dark Aura : instead of multiplying the power of Fairy - or Dark -type moves by those Abilities' normal multiplier of approximately 4/3 (or more precisely, 5448/4096), the power of moves of that type is divided by 4/3 instead, resulting in a 25% decrease in power as long as both Abilities are active. Even if a Pokémon with Mold Breaker , Teravolt , or Turboblaze uses a Fairy- or Dark-type move, the effect of Aura Break still applies. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] In Generation VII , Zygarde with the Ability Aura Break can be separated back into Cores and Cells by the Reassembly Unit . In Generation VIII only, the Zygarde Cube can be used to switch Zygarde's Ability between Aura Break and Power Construct ; in all games, Zygarde cannot switch between Abilities using an Ability Capsule or an Ability Patch .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Aura Break inverts the effects of Fairy Aura and Dark Aura : instead of multiplying the power of Fairy - or Dark -type moves by those Abilities' normal multiplier of approximately 4/3 (or more precisely, 5448/4096), the power of moves of that type is divided by 4/3 instead, resulting in a 25% decrease in power as long as both Abilities are active. Even if a Pokémon with Mold Breaker , Teravolt , or Turboblaze uses a Fairy- or Dark-type move, the effect of Aura Break still applies.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD If there is a Pokémon with the Dark Aura or Fairy Aura Ability, the Ability's effect will be reversed! Dark- and Fairy-type moves become weak!
